mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS spotId, s.name AS spotName, s.experience, s.region, mf.forecast_date AS forecastDate, mf.time_slot AS timeSlot, mf.total_index AS totalIndex, mf.weather, mf.tide, s.post_count AS postCount, CAST(mf.metrics AS CHAR) AS metrics FROM spots s LEFT JOIN marine_forecasts mf ON mf.id = ( SELECT mf2.id FROM marine_forecasts mf2 WHERE mf2.spot_id = s.id
AND mf2.forecast_date = #{targetDate}
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN mf2.forecast_date >= CURRENT_DATE THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ABS(DATEDIFF(mf2.forecast_date, CURRENT_DATE)),
mf2.forecast_date ASC, mf2.time_slot ASC, mf2.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE s.active = 1
AND mf.id IS NOT NULL
AND s.experience = #{experience}
AND s.region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%')
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY CASE mf.total_index WHEN '매우나쁨' THEN 1 WHEN '나쁨' THEN 2 WHEN '보통' THEN 3 WHEN '좋음' THEN 4 WHEN '매우좋음' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END ASC, s.name ASC
ORDER BY s.post_count DESC, s.name ASC
ORDER BY CASE mf.total_index WHEN '매우좋음' THEN 5 WHEN '좋음' THEN 4 WHEN '보통' THEN 3 WHEN '나쁨' THEN 2 WHEN '매우나쁨' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC, s.post_count DESC, s.name ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
